# isCurrentComplicationInfo

**Instance Property**

A Boolean indicating whether the data is related to the app’s complication.

## Declaration

```swift
var isCurrentComplicationInfo: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

This property is set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if you initiated the transfer using the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/transferCurrentComplicationUserInfo(_:)] method of the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession] object or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] otherwise.

## Getting the Transfer Information

- **userInfo**: The data being transferred.
